posts.text: BREAKING: Alphabet, $GOOGL, is planning on launching a new “frozen” chip to run its AI models more efficiently, per The Information. Details include: 1. This new server chip would directly integrate the blueprint of its Gemini AI model 2. The chip would then enable Alphabet to provide its AI models to users much more efficiently 3. The chip's developers estimate that it would be 6 to 10 times more efficient than the most recent version of Google's existing line of AI chips Another tech giant has entered the chip race.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
